title: Junior NLP Engineer
description: We are looking for a Junior NLP Engineer with experience in Python, spaCy, transformers, and text classification. Responsibilities include building resume parsers and matching algorithms.

title: Data Scientist - Recommendation
description: Build recommendation systems using embeddings, cosine similarity, and machine learning pipelines. Experience with scikit-learn and sentence-transformers preferred.

title: Backend Developer (Flask)
description: Develop REST APIs in Flask/Django. Knowledge of Docker and AWS is a plus.

title: Full Stack Developer (MERN)
description: Work on MERN stack projects including React frontend, Node.js backend, and MongoDB. Build job portals and recommendation systems.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop job recommendation algorithms using collaborative filtering and content-based filtering. Work with resume parsing and skill extraction.

title: Frontend Developer (React)
description: Build responsive job portals using React, Tailwind CSS, and state management. Focus on job search UI and dashboard components.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Deploy ML models and web applications using Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. Set up CI/CD pipelines for job portal backend.

title: AI Engineer
description: Create NLP-based resume parsing systems using OCR, entity recognition, and skill extraction for automated candidate screening.

title: Backend Developer (Node.js)
description: Build scalable APIs for job portals using Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Implement authentication, job matching, and notification systems.
